title: 'If, because of that, we stop innovation, we don’t go anywhere': we got a first look at Samsung Intelligent Eyewear, the smart glasses entering a fraught market worried about privacy
summary: As with other intelligent wearables Samsung has produced with partner Google (see the much more powerful, reality-mixing Samsung Galaxy XR headset ), the new Warby Parker and Gentle Monster Intelligent Eyewear put AI access at the center.
caption: output/2026-07-22/if-because-of-that-we-stop-innovation-we-don-t-go-anywhere-we-got-a-fi.txt
